description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that builds the OCaml project with five jobs named ocaml:4030, ocaml:4042, ocaml:4050, ocaml:4060 and ocaml:4070, each using the ocaml/opam2 Docker image for the matching OCaml version (4.03‑4.07) and running the command bash -c \"$BUILD_SCRIPT\". Add a pages job that runs bash -c \"$BUILD_SCRIPT\" followed by bash -c \"$BUILD_DOC\", publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Add a testpages job that runs the same two commands but is excluded from the master branch. All jobs use the BUILD_SCRIPT and BUILD_DOC variables defined in the pipeline and run in the default stage.
